ogTitle: Horfield vs Hotham Heights: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Horfield and Hotham Heights.
heading: Horfield vs Hotham Heights — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Horfield, Victoria and Hotham Heights, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Horfield has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Hotham Heights (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Horfield or Hotham Heights safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Horfield has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Hotham Heights scores 57/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Horfield scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Hotham Heights scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Horfield or Hotham Heights?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Horfield has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
